intro: Seven articles published between April 16 and April 26, 2026, cover the DDoS tag, with a severity mix of three high, three medium, and one informational report. The threat actor Mirai was observed targeting internet infrastructure, social media, and telecommunications sectors in Canada, Germany, the Global region, and the United States. Key vulnerabilities include CVE-2025-29635 with a CVSS score of 8.8 and CVE-2024-3721 with a CVSS score of 6.3.
